name: Smokey Tomato Catsup
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds tomato, coarsely chopped (or 3 28 oz. cans crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large nonreactive pot and bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally until vegetables are soft and sauce is reduced by one quarter.
3. Puree the mixture in a food processor.
4. Strain through a sieve into a clean pot (for a chunkier catsup, do not strain).
5. Bring to a boil over medium-low heat and simmer (partially covered to prevent splatters) for one hour or until quite thick and dark brownish red.
6. Store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month. Freeze for longer storage or can.
